overview.short: Manyamkonda Sri Lakshmi Venkateshwara Swamy Temple is a hill shrine of Lord Venkateshwara, located 5 km from Devarakadra town on the National highway 167 to Raichur.
overview.description: Manyamkonda Sri Lakshmi Venkateshwara Swamy Temple is a hill shrine of Lord Venkateshwara, located 5 km from Devarakadra town on the National highway 167 to Raichur. It was the first temple in Telangana to have ropeway access.

topPlaces.name: Devarakadra
topPlaces.description: Devarkadra is an Assembly constituency Headquarts in Telangana Assembly and also a Mandal in Mahbubnagar district, Telangana.

items.note: Devarkadra is an Assembly constituency Headquarts in Telangana Assembly and also a Mandal in Mahbubnagar district, Telangana.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Manyamkonda?
faq.a: The best time to visit Manyamkonda is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Rajiv Gandhi International Airport, Hyderabad (88 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (105 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Manyamkonda?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Manyamkonda at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Manyamkonda?
faq.a: Stays in Manyamkonda start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.
